description: Create Adapty client module, rewrite PaywallScreen and StandalonePaywall to use Adapty, update AuthGate for Adapty profile checks, update subscription store, update legal.tsx references, and clean up old RevenueCat client file.
steps: Create src/lib/adaptyClient.ts - a new Adapty SDK wrapper module that: (1) lazily imports react-native-adapty in try/catch for Expo Go compatibility; (2) exports an activateAdapty() function that calls adapty.activate() with process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_ADAPTY_KEY; (3) exports async getPaywall(placementId: string) that fetches the paywall and calls adapty.logShowPaywall(paywall); (4) exports async getProfile() returning the Adapty profile; (5) exports async makePurchase(product) to purchase a product; (6) exports async restorePurchases(); (7) exports a hasEntitlement(profile, entitlementId) utility; (8) exports isAdaptyEnabled() boolean check. Use the same Result pattern as the old revenuecatClient for consistency: { ok: true, data } | { ok: false, reason, error? }. The entitlement ID is 'pro_journal'. The placement ID is 'main_paywall'.

Rewrite src/components/onboarding/PaywallScreen.tsx: Remove all RevenueCat imports and replace with Adapty client imports. In the useEffect, call getPaywall('main_paywall') to fetch paywall and products. Map products to yearly (product ID 'yearly_journal') and monthly (product ID 'monthly_journal'). Update pricing display: yearly = '$69/year' with 7-day free trial, monthly = '$9.99/month' no trial. Use adapty.logShowPaywall(paywall) when paywall is displayed (already handled by getPaywall helper). Purchase via makePurchase(product). On purchase success check profile for 'pro_journal' entitlement. Restore via restorePurchases(). Keep existing UI design, animations, exit modal, and haptics. Update all internal references from 'premium' entitlement to 'pro_journal'. Show toast on success. Keep the feature flags structure. Replace isRevenueCatEnabled() checks with isAdaptyEnabled().

Rewrite src/components/StandalonePaywall.tsx: Same migration as PaywallScreen - replace RevenueCat with Adapty. Fetch paywall from 'main_paywall' placement. Map products by ID. Update pricing to $69/year and $9.99/month. Use makePurchase/restorePurchases from adaptyClient. Check 'pro_journal' entitlement. Keep existing UI structure, benefits carousel, timeline, exit modal.

Update src/components/AuthGate.tsx: Replace import from '@/lib/revenuecatClient' with '@/lib/adaptyClient'. Call activateAdapty() early in the auth check flow. Replace getCustomerInfo() with getProfile(). Check for 'pro_journal' entitlement using hasEntitlement(profile, 'pro_journal') instead of checking entitlements.active['premium']. Replace isRevenueCatEnabled() with isAdaptyEnabled(). Keep the same gating logic: loading -> onboarding -> paywall -> biometric -> app.
Update src/lib/state/subscription-store.ts: Update the doc comment to reference Adapty instead of RevenueCat.

Update src/app/legal.tsx: Replace the RevenueCat references in the 'In-App Purchases' section with Adapty (adapty.io/privacy). Replace the bullet point 'RevenueCat - Subscription management (revenuecat.com)' with 'Adapty - Subscription management (adapty.io)'.

Update src/app/(tabs)/settings.tsx: If there are any direct imports from revenuecatClient, replace them with adaptyClient equivalents. (Currently it only imports subscription-store, which remains the same.)
acceptance_criteria: src/lib/adaptyClient.ts exists with all exported functions: activateAdapty, getPaywall, getProfile, makePurchase, restorePurchases, hasEntitlement, isAdaptyEnabled
No file in src/ imports from '@/lib/revenuecatClient'
PaywallScreen.tsx uses Adapty to fetch paywall from 'main_paywall' placement and calls adapty.logShowPaywall
PaywallScreen.tsx displays $69/year with 7-day trial and $9.99/month pricing
AuthGate.tsx calls activateAdapty() and checks 'pro_journal' entitlement via getProfile()
legal.tsx references Adapty instead of RevenueCat
Running tsc --noEmit produces no TypeScript errors
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Vocolens-app && grep -r 'revenuecatClient' src/ (should return empty)
Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Vocolens-app && grep -r 'react-native-purchases' src/ (should return empty)
Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Vocolens-app && grep 'logShowPaywall' src/lib/adaptyClient.ts (should find the call)
